data.title: Athabasca Oil reports Q2 results
data.description:
• Athabasca Oil press release (OTCPK:ATHOF): Q2 GAAP EPS of $0.11.
  • Average production of 39,088 boe/d (98% Liquids), representing 4% (15% per share) growth year-over-year.
  • The Company anticipates production at the upper end of guidance of 37,500 – 39,500 boe/d with an exit rate of ~41,000 boe/d.

data.title: Pony.ai launches 24/7 robotaxi service in Guangzhou, Shenzhen
data.description:
• Pony.ai (NASDAQ:PONY) has launched round-the-clock robotaxi operations in Guangzhou and Shenzhen, two major economic hubs in southern China.
  • This marks a significant milestone in the company's China expansion, extending service hours from 15 hours daily to full 24/7 availability.
  • In parallel, Pony.ai has also expanded its robotaxi testing window in Beijing to 24 hours a day.
  • PONY +2.21% premarket to $14.7.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: CenterPoint Energy to hire 200 new lineworkers in 2025 and nearly 800 by 2030
data.description:
CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) on Friday unveiled a series of efforts to achieve its goal of hiring 200 additional lineworkers by the end of this year, and nearly 800 by 2030.

CenterPoint's accelerated hiring efforts are expected to support energy investments over the next 10 years and help the Greater Houston area meet the rapidly growing demand for local electric workers.

As part of these efforts, CenterPoint is also hosting ongoing job fairs, including collaborating with regional workforce development networks.

These combined workforce expansion efforts will support CenterPoint's (NYSE:CNP) critical resiliency and infrastructure work, including over $53 billion in local energy investments as part of the company's 10-year capital expenditure plan.

data.title: HELLA KGaA reports 1H results
data.description:
• HELLA GmbH & Co. KGaA press release (OTCPK:HLKHF): 1H Development of operating income margin largely stable (-20bps to 6.0%)
  • Revenue of $3.97B (-1.5% Y/Y).
  • Net Cash Flow increased 33.6% to €114m
  • NCF to sales at 2.9% (PY 2.1% of sales)
  • Guidance: Revenue expected between around €7.6 to 8.0 billion

data.title: Portland General Electric Non-GAAP EPS of $0.66 beats by $0.02, revenue of $807M beats by $13.69M
data.description:
• Portland General Electric press release (NYSE:POR): Q2 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.66 beats by $0.02.
  • Revenue of $807M (+6.5% Y/Y) beats by $13.69M.
  • Second quarter financial results reflect significant demand growth from data center customers, driving 16.5% industrial load growth quarter-over-quarter
  • Reaffirming 2025 adjusted earnings guidance of $3.13 to $3.33 per diluted share vs $3.23 consensus.
